{"id":"zheng-shang-you-0ys.3","title":"Combination types and validation","description":"Define all legal combination types: single, pair, triple, triple+pair (5 cards), straight (exactly 5), consecutive pairs (exactly 6), consecutive triples (exactly 6), bombs (4+ of a kind), straight flush (exactly 5). Validate combinations against rules. Handle joker pairs (must be same type).","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","owner":"chonw89@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-11T04:14:31Z","created_by":"xnmp","updated_at":"2026-03-11T04:14:31Z"}

old_value: {"id":"zheng-shang-you-0ys.4","title":"Dynamic card ranking system","description":"Implement per-player card ranking based on their current high-card rank. The high card of hearts outranks same-rank cards of other suits. Ranking wraps/increments correctly. Comparison operators for all combination types respect per-player rankings.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","owner":"chonw89@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-11T04:14:36Z","created_by":"xnmp","updated_at":"2026-03-11T04:14:36Z"}

old_value: {"id":"zheng-shang-you-0ys.5","title":"Wildcard mechanics","description":"Heart-suit high card functions as wildcard: can substitute for any card in any combination including straights, straight flushes, and bombs. Generate all valid wildcard substitution options. Wildcard-containing bombs and straight flushes are still valid bombs.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","owner":"chonw89@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-11T04:14:41Z","created_by":"xnmp","updated_at":"2026-03-11T04:14:41Z"}

new_value: Wildcard substitution in src/zsy/wildcard.py with 12 tests

Already implemented in combinations.py: _bomb_power, _bomb_beats, Combination.beats. Bomb hierarchy tested in test_combinations.py (straight flush > 5-of-a-kind, 6-of-a-kind > straight flush, etc.). Wildcard bombs use same comparison via classify.

old_value: {"id":"zheng-shang-you-0ys.6","title":"Legal move generator","description":"Given a hand, current trick type (or free lead), and wildcard availability: enumerate all legal plays including pass. Handle all combination types, wildcard substitutions, bomb hierarchy (straight flush \u003e 5-of-a-kind, but not \u003e 6-of-a-kind). Must be fast — this is called millions of times during training.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","owner":"chonw89@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-11T04:14:51Z","created_by":"xnmp","updated_at":"2026-03-11T04:14:51Z"}

old_value: {"id":"zheng-shang-you-0ys.8","title":"Game loop and trick resolution","description":"Full game loop: deal cards evenly, players take turns playing or passing, trick resolution (last uncontested player leads next), round ends when a player empties hand. Support variable player count (2-6+). Pass-and-return semantics (can re-enter trick after passing).","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","owner":"chonw89@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-11T04:15:06Z","created_by":"xnmp","updated_at":"2026-03-11T04:15:06Z"}

new_value: Game loop in src/zsy/game.py, optimized legal_moves.py. 14 game tests + 14 legal move tests, all passing. Games complete in <0.1s for 2-4 players.

old_value: {"id":"zheng-shang-you-0ys.9","title":"Jing gong card exchange","description":"Post-round card exchange: loser gives their best card to winner, winner returns any card below 10. Handle edge cases (what if loser has no cards above winner's return constraint).","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","owner":"chonw89@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-11T04:15:19Z","created_by":"xnmp","updated_at":"2026-03-11T04:15:19Z"}
